project_type: C++20 Enterprise Cybersecurity Platform - static library modules
build_system: CMake 3.22 with vendored third-party libs (spdlog, nlohmann_json, doctest, sqlite3 stub). No package manager - all deps are header-only or vendored in third_party/
test_framework: doctest with single test_main.cpp (DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT_WITH_MAIN), test files named tests/<module>/test_*.cpp
verification_instructions: 1. Run cmake configure+build. 2. Run ctest. 3. All tests pass.
setup_instructions: Already set up - cmake and gcc available. Build with cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external downloads. All dependencies already vendored in third_party/. Use pre-installed GCC 11.5, CMake 3.22.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: CRTP Model for DB entities, ModuleLogger from core/Logger.h, Result<T,E> for error handling, doctest for tests, thread-safe with mutex
key_patterns: 1. Each module: include/<module>/*.h + src/*.cpp, CMakeLists.txt links to threatone_core. 2. Logger: Core::Logger::instance().getModuleLogger(name). 3. Interfaces: IFoo pure virtual base. 4. DB Models: Model<Derived> CRTP with tableName(), fields(), fromRow(), toParams(), toJson(), fromJson(). 5. Tests: TEST_CASE with doctest, no fixtures needed. 6. Events: EventBus pub/sub with typed events. 7. Thread safety: mutable std::mutex mutex_ with lock_guard.
